name: Earn To Die
metaDescription: Smash zombies in Earn To Die Unblocked. Upgrade your car to reach the safe zone!
description: Earn To Die Unblocked is a post-apocalyptic racing game where you smash through zombies to reach safety. Upgrade your vehicle in Earn To Die Unblocked with armor and weapons to survive the dangerous wasteland.

name: Moto X3M
metaDescription: Master deadly stunts in Moto X3M Unblocked. Race through insane tracks and survive!
description: Moto X3M Unblocked is the ultimate bike stunt game featuring dozens of deadly obstacle courses. Perform flips and wheelies in Moto X3M Unblocked to shave seconds off your time and earn three stars on every level.

name: Super Mario Bros
metaDescription: Classic Nintendo fun in Super Mario Bros Unblocked. Rescue the princess today!
description: Super Mario Bros Unblocked brings the classic Nintendo experience to your browser for endless platforming fun. Rescue the princess in Super Mario Bros Unblocked by jumping over Goombas and entering green pipes.

name: 12 Minibattles
metaDescription: Challenge friends in 12 Minibattles Unblocked. Play soccer, wrestling, and more!
description: 12 Minibattles Unblocked is a hilarious collection of local multiplayer games for you and a friend. Compete in 12 Minibattles Unblocked to see who is the master of soccer, wrestling, and fast-paced shooting.

name: Among Us
metaDescription: Find the impostor in Among Us Unblocked. Work together to save your ship crew!
description: Among Us Unblocked is a thrilling game of teamwork and betrayal set on a malfunctioning spaceship. Identify the impostors in Among Us Unblocked before they eliminate the entire crew during your secret repair missions.

name: Red Ball 4
metaDescription: Bounce through levels in Red Ball 4 Unblocked. Stop the evil squares and save the world!
description: Red Ball 4 Unblocked is a vibrant physics platformer where you must stop evil squares from turning the world into a cube. Roll and bounce in Red Ball 4 Unblocked to solve puzzles and defeat epic bosses.

name: Subway Surfers
metaDescription: Dash through the train yard in Subway Surfers Unblocked. Dodge trains and escape the inspector now!
description: Subway Surfers Unblocked is the ultimate endless runner where you dash through vibrant train yards. While playing Subway Surfers Unblocked, you must dodge oncoming trains and collect coins to unlock cool characters and boards.

name: Hills Of Steel
metaDescription: Physics-based tank battles in Hills Of Steel Unblocked. Destroy enemy forces now!
description: Hills of Steel Unblocked is a physics-based tank battle game where you destroy enemy forces on rugged terrain. Upgrade your tank in Hills of Steel Unblocked to survive powerful explosions and massive boss fights.

name: 1v1 Lol
metaDescription: Build and shoot in 1v1 Lol Unblocked. Outplay your rivals in fast battle royale duels!
description: 1v1 Lol Unblocked is a competitive building and shooting game similar to popular battle royales. Practice your mechanics in 1v1 Lol Unblocked to outbuild and outshoot your opponents in fast-paced competitive duels.

name: Battle Wheels
metaDescription: Head-to-head car combat in Battle Wheels Unblocked. Hit the driver and win!
description: Battle Wheels Unblocked is a head-to-head car combat game where you aim to hit the opponent's driver. Upgrade your vehicle in Battle Wheels Unblocked to become the invincible champion of the arena.

name: Basket Champs
metaDescription: Represent your country in Basket Champs Unblocked. Shoot your way to the finals!
description: Basket Champs Unblocked is a tournament-style basketball game with unique physics and challenging mechanics. Represent your country in Basket Champs Unblocked and shoot your way through the brackets to the championship finals.

name: Bubble Shooter
metaDescription: Pop colorful bubbles in Bubble Shooter Unblocked. Clear the board for big scores!
description: Bubble Shooter Unblocked is a classic match-3 puzzle game where you clear the board by popping colorful bubbles. Aim carefully in Bubble Shooter Unblocked to create massive chain reactions and score big points.

name: Monkey Mart
metaDescription: Run your own shop in Monkey Mart Unblocked. Grow fruit and serve animal customers!
description: Monkey Mart Unblocked is a fun idle management game where you run a busy supermarket for animals. Expand your business in Monkey Mart Unblocked by growing various crops and stocking shelves with fresh goods.

name: Bloxorz
metaDescription: Roll the 3D block in Bloxorz Unblocked. Complete 33 levels of logic puzzles!
description: Bloxorz Unblocked is a legendary logic puzzle where you roll a 3D block into a square hole. Navigate through 33 levels in Bloxorz Unblocked while avoiding falling off the edge of the floating board.

name: Mad Day
metaDescription: Save your octopus in Mad Day Unblocked. Blast through aliens and obstacles!
description: Mad Day Unblocked is an action-packed driving and shooting game about a man rescuing his pet octopus. Blast through aliens in Mad Day Unblocked using your armored truck and various high-tech weapons.

name: Jelly Truck
metaDescription: Drive a squishy truck in Jelly Truck Unblocked. Navigate through wobbly 2D worlds!
description: Jelly Truck Unblocked is a squishy driving game where you navigate a wobbly truck through a colorful world. Conquer difficult terrain in Jelly Truck Unblocked by using your flexible vehicle to absorb shocks and jumps.

name: Kart Bros
metaDescription: Drift to victory in Kart Bros Unblocked. Race against rivals in fun kart tracks!
description: Kart Bros Unblocked is a fun racing game that combines karting mechanics with challenging tracks. Drift around corners in Kart Bros Unblocked to overtake your opponents and cross the finish line first for the win.

name: Animal Arena
metaDescription: Battle your friends in Animal Arena Unblocked. Choose your animal and fight!
description: Animal Arena Unblocked is a chaotic local multiplayer brawler where cute animals fight for dominance. Battle your friends in Animal Arena Unblocked across various maps with unique weapons and powerful power-ups.

name: Duck Life
metaDescription: Train your duck to win in Duck Life Unblocked. Run, fly, and swim to become a champion!
description: Duck Life Unblocked is a training RPG where you turn a tiny duckling into a racing champion. Balance your stats in Duck Life Unblocked by running, flying, and swimming to win every tournament and save your farm.

name: Temple Run 2
metaDescription: Escape the demon monkey in Temple Run 2 Unblocked. Navigate cliffs and zip lines!
description: Temple Run 2 Unblocked is the thrilling sequel to the famous endless runner featuring new environments and obstacles. Escape the demon monkey in Temple Run 2 Unblocked while navigating dangerous cliffs and fast zip lines.

name: Bitlife
metaDescription: Live a virtual life in Bitlife Unblocked. Make choices and see where life takes you!
description: Bitlife Unblocked is a life simulator that lets you make every choice from birth to death. Live any life you can imagine in Bitlife Unblocked by choosing your unique career, relationships, and daily lifestyle.

name: Age Of War
metaDescription: Defend your base through the ages in Age Of War Unblocked. Evolve your army and conquer!
description: Age Of War Unblocked is a classic defense game where you evolve your civilization through five different ages. Command powerful armies in Age Of War Unblocked to destroy the enemy base and survive the test of time.

name: Masked Forces
metaDescription: Tactical FPS action in Masked Forces Unblocked. Choose your weapon and dominate!
description: Masked Forces Unblocked is a tactical first-person shooter with various game modes and powerful weapons. Join the battlefield in Masked Forces Unblocked to eliminate enemies and prove your elite combat skills.

name: Poor Bunny
metaDescription: Collect carrots in Poor Bunny Unblocked. Dodge deadly traps and unlock skins!
description: Poor Bunny Unblocked is a fast-paced arcade game where you collect carrots while dodging deadly traps. Survive as long as possible in Poor Bunny Unblocked to set high scores and unlock new cute bunny skins.

metaDescription: Merge tiles and reach 2048 Unblocked. Test your math and strategy skills in this puzzle!
description: 2048 Unblocked is a mind-bending puzzle game that challenges your math and strategy skills. Swipe tiles in 2048 Unblocked to merge matching numbers and reach the legendary 2048 tile without filling the board.

name: Basket Bros
metaDescription: Frantic 1v1 basketball in Basket Bros Unblocked. Dunk on your rivals today!
description: Basket Bros Unblocked is a frantic 1v1 basketball game filled with massive dunks and fast-paced action. Outplay your rivals in Basket Bros Unblocked by using special moves and high-flying jumps to win the match.

name: Traffic Rush
metaDescription: Control the intersection in Traffic Rush Unblocked. Prevent crashes and manage traffic!
description: Traffic Rush Unblocked is a high-stakes management game where you control a busy intersection. Prevent massive crashes in Traffic Rush Unblocked by tapping cars to speed them through the crossing safely.

name: Ape Sling
metaDescription: Launch your ape to safety in Ape Sling Unblocked. Avoid traps and climb high!
description: Ape Sling Unblocked is a fast-paced physics game where you launch an ape through dangerous obstacles. Master the slingshot mechanic in Ape Sling Unblocked to avoid buzzsaws and climb higher than ever before.

name: Stickman Bike
metaDescription: Perform extreme stunts in Stickman Bike Unblocked. Race over obstacles without crashing your bike!
description: Stickman Bike Unblocked offers an intense physics-based racing experience across challenging terrains. Master every stunt in Stickman Bike Unblocked to reach the finish line without crashing your ride on the deadly obstacles.

name: Hole.io
metaDescription: Consume the city in Hole.io Unblocked. Grow your black hole and dominate the map!
description: Hole io Unblocked is a fun multiplayer game where you control a black hole consuming an entire city. Grow your size in Hole io Unblocked by swallowing cars, buildings, and other players to dominate the map.

name: OvO
metaDescription: Fast-paced parkour in OvO Unblocked. Slide and jump through difficult obstacles!
description: OvO Unblocked is a fast-paced parkour game where movement and momentum are key to beating levels. Slide, jump, and dive in OvO Unblocked to navigate through difficult obstacles in the shortest time possible.

name: Snow Rider 3D
metaDescription: Sled down the mountain in Snow Rider 3D Unblocked. Collect gifts and unlock new sleighs!
description: Snow Rider 3D Unblocked is a breathtaking winter racing game where you sled down massive snowy mountains. Collect gifts in Snow Rider 3D Unblocked to unlock new sleighs while dodging dangerous trees and rocks.

name: Stick Merge
metaDescription: Combine weapons in Stick Merge Unblocked. Defend your base and upgrade your guns!
description: Stick Merge Unblocked is an addictive idle game where you combine weapons to create powerful guns. Defend your territory in Stick Merge Unblocked by shooting down stickmen with your lethal upgraded gear.

name: Run 3
metaDescription: Defy gravity in Run 3 Unblocked. Run through space tunnels with unique characters!
description: Run 3 Unblocked is a gravity-defying endless runner set in a series of tunnels in outer space. Explore new levels in Run 3 Unblocked as different alien characters with unique abilities to stay on track.

name: Raft Wars
metaDescription: Defend your loot in Raft Wars Unblocked. Shoot down pirates with tennis balls!
description: Raft Wars Unblocked is a turn-based shooting game where you defend your treasure from pirates and vikings. Use projectiles in Raft Wars Unblocked to knock enemies off their boats and protect your secret loot.

name: Speed Stars
metaDescription: Win every race in Speed Stars Unblocked. Mash the buttons and be the fastest!
description: Speed Stars Unblocked is a competitive track and field game that tests your button-mashing speed. Win every race in Speed Stars Unblocked to become the fastest athlete in the virtual sporting world.

name: Flip Bros
metaDescription: Launch and flip in Flip Bros Unblocked. Use momentum to defeat your targets!
description: Flip Bros Unblocked is a physics-based platformer where you launch your character to defeat various enemies. Use momentum in Flip Bros Unblocked to flip through the air and land powerful hits on your targets.

name: Cat Trap
metaDescription: Don't let the cat escape in Cat Trap Unblocked. Solve this clever logic puzzle now!
description: Cat Trap Unblocked is a clever logic puzzle where you must encircle a cat to prevent its escape. Plan your moves carefully in Cat Trap Unblocked to block every possible exit on the shifting grid of circles.

name: Basket Swooshes
metaDescription: Win the tournament in Basket Swooshes Unblocked. Play 1v1 basketball shootouts!
description: Basket Swooshes Unblocked brings competitive tournament basketball directly to your browser. Choose your favorite team in Basket Swooshes Unblocked and defeat opponents in intense 1v1 shootout matches to win the cup.

name: Drift Hunters
metaDescription: Tune your car in Drift Hunters Unblocked. Perform the perfect drift on 3D tracks!
description: Drift Hunters Unblocked is a realistic 3D drifting simulator featuring a wide range of customizable cars. Tune your engine in Drift Hunters Unblocked and hit the tracks to perform the perfect high-speed drift.

name: Tunnel Rush
metaDescription: Speed through neon tunnels in Tunnel Rush Unblocked. Avoid obstacles at high speed!
description: Tunnel Rush Unblocked is a dizzying 3D runner where you speed through a neon tunnel filled with barriers. React quickly in Tunnel Rush Unblocked to avoid obstacles as the speed reaches insane and challenging levels.

name: Retro Bowl
metaDescription: Lead your team to victory in Retro Bowl Unblocked. Manage your NFL franchise now!
description: Retro Bowl Unblocked is an 8-bit American football simulator that puts you in charge of your own franchise. Manage your roster in Retro Bowl Unblocked and lead your team to victory on the gridiron to win the bowl.

name: Geometry Dash
metaDescription: Jump to the beat in Geometry Dash Unblocked. Test your reflexes on rhythm-based levels!
description: Geometry Dash Unblocked is a rhythm-based platformer that tests your reflexes and timing to the limit. Jump through spikes and obstacles in Geometry Dash Unblocked while enjoying an energetic and fast-paced soundtrack.

name: Jumping Shell
metaDescription: Solve riddles in Jumping Shell Unblocked. Shed your shell to reach new heights!
description: Jumping Shell Unblocked is a clever puzzle platformer where you must shed and regain your shell to solve riddles. Navigate complex levels in Jumping Shell Unblocked by using your unique size-changing ability to find the exit.

name: Papa's Freezeria
metaDescription: Serve perfect sundaes in Papa's Freezeria Unblocked. Earn tips and upgrade your shop!
description: Papas Freezeria Unblocked is a classic management game where you run an ice cream shop on a tropical island. Serve perfect sundaes in Papas Freezeria Unblocked to earn big tips and upgrade your popular restaurant.

name: Bacon May Die
metaDescription: Fight off hordes of enemies in Bacon May Die Unblocked. Use crazy weapons to survive!
description: Bacon May Die Unblocked is a high-energy brawler featuring a pig fighting off hordes of enemies. Unleash crazy combos in Bacon May Die Unblocked using guns, bats, and ninja skills to survive the chaos.

name: 2 Minute Football
metaDescription: Score touchdowns in 2 Minute Football Unblocked. Can you win before time runs out?
description: 2 Minute Football Unblocked delivers quick American football action where every second counts on the clock. Call the right plays in 2 Minute Football Unblocked to score touchdowns and win the game in record time.

name: Drift Boss
metaDescription: Slide around corners in Drift Boss Unblocked. Stay on the track and collect coins!
description: Drift Boss Unblocked is a rhythmic driving game where you master the art of sliding around corners. Time your drifts perfectly in Drift Boss Unblocked to stay on the narrow track and collect high-value rewards.

name: Flappy Bird
metaDescription: Tap between pipes in Flappy Bird Unblocked. Can you beat the frustrating high score?
description: Flappy Bird Unblocked is the notoriously difficult arcade game where you tap to fly between green pipes. Test your patience in Flappy Bird Unblocked and try to beat the world's most frustrating and addictive high score.

name: Highway Traffic
metaDescription: Weave through cars in Highway Traffic Unblocked. Drive fast and avoid crashes!
description: Highway Traffic Unblocked is an intense driving simulator where you weave through heavy traffic at high speeds. Test your driving skills in Highway Traffic Unblocked across different modes and various weather conditions.

name: Basketball Frvr
metaDescription: Shoot endless hoops in Basketball Frvr Unblocked. Can you set a new high score?
description: Basketball Frvr Unblocked is an addictive hoop-shooting game perfect for practicing your precision. Aim for the net in Basketball Frvr Unblocked to score consecutive baskets and set a new personal high score.

name: Level Devil
metaDescription: Survive the troll traps in Level Devil Unblocked. Stay alert for shifting floors!
description: Level Devil Unblocked is a troll-style platformer designed to trick you with unexpected traps. Stay alert in Level Devil Unblocked because the floors and walls might disappear or move at any moment.

name: Stickman Hook
metaDescription: Swing like a pro in Stickman Hook Unblocked. Perform epic flips to reach the goal!
description: Stickman Hook Unblocked is an addictive physics game where you swing through the air like a spider. Master the rope mechanics in Stickman Hook Unblocked to perform epic flips and reach the finish line with speed.

name: Elastic Man
metaDescription: Stretch Morty's face in Elastic Man Unblocked. Experience the funniest 3D physics online!
description: Elastic Man Unblocked is a hilarious face-stretching simulator featuring incredibly flexible 3D physics. Drag and pull the skin in Elastic Man Unblocked to see the most bizarre and funny expressions ever seen in a browser game.

name: Tictactoe
metaDescription: Play classic X and O in Tictactoe Unblocked. Challenge friends or the AI now!
description: Tictactoe Unblocked is the digital version of the classic X and O game we all know and love. Challenge your friends or the AI in Tictactoe Unblocked to see who can get three in a row first on the grid.

name: Funny Shooter 2
metaDescription: Fight weird enemies in Funny Shooter 2 Unblocked. Survive the absurd FPS chaos!
description: Funny Shooter 2 Unblocked is a bizarre FPS where you fight off waves of colorful, weird enemies. Use a massive arsenal in Funny Shooter 2 Unblocked to survive the absurd chaos of each challenging level.

name: Slope
metaDescription: Race down the neon track in Slope Unblocked. Dodge red blocks and stay on course!
description: Slope Unblocked is a high-speed 3D runner that challenges you to stay on a neon track while dodging red hazards. Maintain your balance in Slope Unblocked as the speed increases and the platforms shift and rotate.

name: Bob The Robber 4
metaDescription: Sneak past high-tech security in Bob The Robber 4 Unblocked. Steal the loot and escape!
description: Bob The Robber 4 Unblocked takes you on a stealthy heist adventure through Paris and Japan. Avoid high-tech security cameras and guards in Bob The Robber 4 Unblocked to steal the treasures and escape unnoticed.

name: Dreadhead Parkour
metaDescription: Urban flips and slides in Dreadhead Parkour Unblocked. Reach the goal with flow!
description: Dreadhead Parkour Unblocked is a smooth movement game where you perform flips and slides to reach the goal. Master the flow in Dreadhead Parkour Unblocked to overcome complex urban obstacles and traps.

name: Bad Ice Cream 2
metaDescription: Collect fruit and avoid monsters in Bad Ice Cream 2 Unblocked. Play with a friend!
description: Bad Ice Cream 2 Unblocked is a cool arcade adventure where you collect fruits while avoiding frosty monsters. Use ice blocks strategically in Bad Ice Cream 2 Unblocked to trap enemies and clear each level quickly.

name: Cookie Clicker
metaDescription: Bake billions of treats in Cookie Clicker Unblocked. Upgrade your bakery and hire grandmas!
description: Cookie Clicker Unblocked is the legendary idle game that started it all, allowing you to bake billions of treats. Upgrade your production in Cookie Clicker Unblocked by hiring grandmas and building massive cookie farms.
